allow: PowerShell($bunBin = "C:\\Users\\Corey Clark\\.bun\\bin"; $userPath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\); if \($userPath -split ';' -contains $bunBin\) { "Already on user PATH — no change needed." } else { $newPath = if \([string]::IsNullOrEmpty\($userPath\)\) { $bunBin } else { "$userPath;$bunBin" }; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", $newPath, "User"\); "Added '$bunBin' to user PATH." })
